heroHeadline: Iran Fires Six Missile Salvos; Houthis Launch Second Wave; Hezbollah Rockets Hit Galilee in Coordinated Multi-Front Attack
heroSubtitle: Iran launches 6 ballistic missile salvos at Israel; Houthis strike twice within 24 hours of re-entering war; Hezbollah rockets strike Tiberias in coordinated Axis of Resistance assault as U.S.-Israel war on Iran enters second month
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, IDF, Gaza Ministry of Health, B'Tselem, ICC, ICJ, Reuters, Al Jazeera, OHCHR, UNRWA, Yesh Din, and institutional analyses. Casualty figures are subject to ongoing verification. The conflict has persisted since Israeli independence on May 14, 1948.
